description: A conceptual design engineer needs to verify that the required air freight cargo containers fit within the eCRM-001 aircraft's lower fuselage lobe. Read the specification document at /home/ga/Desktop/packaging_spec.txt to get the dimensions and coordinates for the forward and aft cargo blocks. Then, in OpenVSP (with the pre-loaded eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 model), add two new Fuselage components to act as internal volume proxies. Name them 'FwdCargo' and 'AftCargo', set their lengths, change their intermediate cross-sections from Circular to Rectangular (or Rounded Rectangle) with the specified width and height, and position them inside the main fuselage using the specified X and Z coordinates. Save the updated model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_packaged.vsp3.
